title: Workhorse Probability of Bankruptcy Analysis
text: Workhorse's probability of bankruptcy is assessed at high levels. The company's odds of financial distress are above 80%, indicating a very high probability of going through significant financial challenges in the upcoming years. Workhorse has an Altman Z-Score of -14.22, placing it in the distress zone with bankruptcy possibility within the next two years. The company has barely avoided bankruptcy thus far, producing only four vans per week historically and remaining heavily dependent on government aid and subsidies to support its balance sheet. Despite grants and subsidies received, the company continues to burn through cash while remaining unprofitable on every vehicle sold. Financial analysis shows the company burns approximately $3-3.5 million per month in cash, with minimal cash reserves available.
